title: Protectors (law enforcement)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Protector}}
The '''Protectors''' were a law enforcement authority operating on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Essowyn]]. They enforced the will of the [[Council of Elders (Saurton)|Council of Elders]], with complete authority in given [[City/Legends|cities]]. They were a combination of [[Police officer/Legends|police officer]], [[Judge/Legends|judge]], and [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]], and were generally staffed by aggressive bullies.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1991-06-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume One]]''
*<!-- 1994-11-XX -->''[[The Star Wars Planets Collection]]''
